Finally the EP you've all been waiting and waiting for! Dating advice Dating advice 3!
Dabang Edition has returned! Ta-da~ Why is nobody... reacting? Because they're going to edit all that out Staff: WDYM~
We got you Justin, our Opening Fairy Park Gyu Gang Q1
When they say "I can't even look at you right now! Just leave!"
Should I really go home? Or stay?
Please give me wisdom.. If you do leave, that would be the end It's kind of a fake question What they mean is basically "disappear from my sight" But the moment you actually leave then it becomes "So you're really leaving just like that?" If I had to guess, the one who posted this question is probably male If this person still hasn't left and is just standing there and posted this story then I respect it It's already been 7 days and 8 nights lol The girlfriend be like, "Why aren't you leaving?!" Boyfriend be like, "Just give me a second..! Bros haven't given me the answer yet" (..so now here it is) I'll teach you a good technique When someone says "I can't even look at you right now! Just leave!" Repeat "I'm really leaving, okay?" about 10 times It'll soften him/her even just slighly Like this 10 times? I'm really leaving I'm really leaving x2 I'm really leaving x3 While slowly turning I'm really leaving x4 I'm really leaving x5 I'm really leaving x6 I'm really leaving x7 I'm really leaving x8 Really! Leaving?! (10,293rd time) I'm really leaving If you do this it softens the mood a bit~ Mix in some mild jest, and say it jokingly Kind of like ice- breaking Dabang owner: Here are the drinks you ordered~ Oh man, thank you Ma'am, why are you acting lol Enjoy~ No, I’m like this normally~ hehehe Ah, it’s been a while, this (dabang) coffee The K-traditional tea~ It’s called "ssanghwa-(r)cha" Ah~ (nom) This is a K-snack This is called "yakgwa" Yak- Gwa~ Looking at your outfit and mine right now there might already be people who clicked away Bro, this is name-brand~ Hey hey, your nipple’s showing.. lol (Oh my) Ah, I don’t like that It’s legit, it's name-brand~ Ah, you

led "yakgwa" Yak- Gwa~ Looking at your outfit and mine right now there might already be people who clicked away Bro, this is name-brand~ Hey hey, your nipple’s showing.. lol (Oh my) Ah, I don’t like that It’s legit, it's name-brand~ Ah, you saeggi Oh s**t Park Gyu Gang Q2: Pros and Cons, if you were to date each other
 
(An imagination they don’t really want to entertain) Ah, there can be pros and cons Daamn!! ‘Pro’s and con’s... (reading the room) This means I have to talk about the pros as well.. Tablo is, well... I don’t think you’d get bored if you date him The con is He’d be kind of annoying
TN: Annoying...? It’s a pro and a con—being talkative Mithra... Mithra, well, the pro is... You don’t need to worry about “what should we eat today?” because his database is amazing The con is... ...a little lazy... hehehe Now, if I talk about Tukutz’s pros I’ll just be honest he’s kind of reassuring When something bad happens or when situations come up where you could panic he keeps his composure really well and leads well like “we have to do it like this,” “we have to do it like that,” that kind of thing
 
TN: An actual compliment?? So it’s really reassuring
 
TN: An actual compliment?? If I talk about the con it’s nothing too serious he’s kind of narrow-minded Pffft Crew: rofl For example Uh... @$)(! Can’t do that! We can’t? Like, over something this small, to get mad like this, or to sulk like that (I'm screwed) Oh s**t I lost Seriously! It’s not easy to sulk at a guest who came on (EPIKASE), you know? Wow~ You’re really revealing that like this? Alright everyone! Quiz! Among the guests who’ve been on EPIKASE so far who is the person DJ Tukutz actually sulked at! Who is it? Number 1! Kang Min-kyung (Watch the EP ) Number 2! Hyun Bong-sik Number 3! Ha Dong Qn! Number 4! Ha Dong Qn! (in unison) lol Guess! (Just smiling) BRB... One glass of cold water, please If you keep drinking only cold stuff like that you’re really going to feel sick It’s because I’ve got that burning inside You kinda have to think about your age now I’m driking something cool because I’ve got this burning inside Why?! Still because of that guest? lol Say it one more time That’s the second time now I’ve only said it twice so far Coincidentally, the next story is Park Gyu Gang Q3: So when on earth do men finally grow up? As a man, husband, father and 40-year-old expert

messing around with each other and like, just... (boop) doing stuff like this Eeeeng... I’d say that still means you’ve grown Hearing that, I think I know exactly what it is The idea of “grown up” vs “not grown up” is whether your life is centered on yourself or centered around your people I think that’s what it comes down to Right x2 I’m totally, like... my people first I’m not important Aren’t we all like that? Did you have to ask it in this particular kind of way to feel s.a.t.i.s.f.i.e.d~?!! Suddenly he started crying his eyes out

title: ‘최악의 연애 썰’ 총출동 연애상담 ft. 욕대행
text:
ful, careful TN: Yay we finally get the full break-up story
 
There was a book we used to like, and in that book She wrote me a letter, a handwritten letter Hold on What b***s*it are you trying to pull here / A "book" you used to like? It’s true! / That “a book we used to like” part is kind of YOU used to like it? Not me Ah~ (immediate agreement) TN: Quick correction
 
My wife liked it What did she say? Ah, like, "I don’t think now is the time for us to date" something like that So because of that you were passed out on the street? (.....Urg) Yeah! Did you drink alone? No, um... There was a friend who knew both me and my wife I got the book in broad daylight and after reading it I thought, “Ah, now isn’t my time” You don’t remember that day, do you? Ah, I do remember So you remember “Hwoooong😭”? / Wow, seriously lol You hugged the pillow like this in front of me and Mithra pressing down hard and then went “Hwoooong😭”? Stop it He's right! And we were watching from this angle, like this I... I She doesn’t li- She doesn’t like me😭 Then Mithra said “Yeah, you’re kinda unlikeable” (Real friends roast you when you’re sad) TN: And then this happened...
 
I just kept following her around the whole time TN: And then this happened...
 
I just kept following her around the whole time The whole time~? We’d keep in touch off and on sometimes see each other too, kinda like that Then one day! (my wife) said she's hanging out with her friends I just went there without thinking brought a whole bundle of alcohol and handed it over and then and there... (You know, right?) And then what? Huh? Did you get paid? No... lol We wrote a contract Payment A Contract lol Next Segment TN: A Special Segment Requested by Park Gyu Gang

 
What is this now? What is a “Proxy Cuss-out Service”? PD Lim: It’s a new segment If it’s a “Proxy Cuss-out Service,” it’s basically a segment for Tukutz Oh man, but I don’t really like that kind of image If you don’t like that image, just stop lol Stop what? Swearing~ Swearing... TN: That is not gonna be easy...
 
Oh geez... Begins!
 
Park Gyu Gang Q5: I got ghosted by someone I had been dating for 5 years Ah, ghosted... Ghosting, this really isn’t okay This is seriously F*ck You Hahaha It already slipped out without me realizing Even after spending almost a month cursing them out I’m still not over it Please curse them out like a dad would Oh %)♡!& saeggi, this... Hey but ghosting, seriously this is such a jerk move Do you have such little confidence in yourself that you can’t just say “let’s break up” or “let’s end things” properly and instead of ending things clearly you just cut off contact and disappear and that just ends everything? (MTF*@) In English this is called "ghosting"
(TN: In Korean "jamsoo" break-up) But isn’t it "diving"?
(TN: "jamsoo" means "dive") Glub glub Gwoaawk(?) Well yeah "jamsoo" does mean “going underwater” But in English it’s ghosting Like “disappearing like a ghost” Ah~ But seriously %)!*! they should actually just die and become ghosts But 5 years together and this happens? Wait a second, 5 years together and they ghost you?! That must feel really unfair Aren't those 5 years such a waste Yeah, that time is such a waste, 5 years But seriously why why not finish things off properly? So In their mind they try to frame it like they’re just shy or awkward like they felt too sorry and didn’t know what to do or that they were too afraid to face the breakup they put up a facade like that they put up a facade like that But honestly that’s just cowardice If you think about it Ah, this is exactly that "not grown up" behavior we mentioned earlier Exactly right !@$*( you jerk You made the other person waste 5 years of their life Then at least you should end things properly at the end Here, take this Alright, next one! so I can come to my senses Why when you meet a man do you think about your ex? No, don’t do that, that’s not cool You got seriously gaslit No x2 Don’t do that This is... But that guy really / going to a realtor that guy saeggi is seriously the worst You’re out looking at houses he’s seriously the worst lol Then like this the realtor who helped show the house around how much of their effort was wasted too, you saeggi Wow... But aside from that, how when you’re planning marriage / were they cheating? They were cheating? But Honestly there's still one silver lining It’s better that it was discovered then Yeah right / true, true If everything was finalized and then you would have had to get a divorce later that would be even worse Better it happened then Luckily you found out before signing the house contract Because honestly that resentment would stay with you forever I think there would definitely be some trauma If you go through something like that you’d clearly have trauma Right, right It’s not that you keep thinking about your ex because your ex was so great It’s tied up with your trauma so you can’t really separate it and it keeps coming up So it’s not coming up because you like them I get that it can’t be helped, but shake it off quickly or take a break for a bit Yeah, that too And it’s not like there are only saeggis like that There are all kinds of people in the world, anyway Ah, but there are plenty who are even worse TN: A novel way of offering consolation
 
lol In the world there are worse saeggis... Some are way worse This saeggi definitely smokes and spits while doing it (Justin’s definition of a bad person) What a piece of sh*t, geez... I’m only doing this because yall asked for it Everyone, we got "requests" to cuss out I really don’t swear much We're performing a Proxy Cuss-Out Service Let’s go~ Park Gyu Gang Q7: My ex-boyfriend gave me a ring priced around 20,000 KRW (~14 USD) and it had a price tag showing about 400,000 KRW The moment I got it I immediately knew that the price tag was fake What is this lol Hold on So it was a 20,000 won ring but it had a 400,000 won price tag on it, okay.. I searched it up later and confirmed everything Aha... Back then my ex-boyfriend had this look like he was watching my reaction It obviously felt like he was trying to fool me Since he’s already my ex now I’m just sharing it for a laugh It’s not like we broke up because of just this one thing anyway Ah~ this is kind of like changing a car model emblem that kind of vibe, right This is exactly what “not grown up” is Bro, you wear that and work out once and all sorts of rashes will appear right here lol Stainless steel? If she had a metal allergy, it’d be a disaster right here Does he think she’s an idiot? No Even if it’s a 20,000 won ring it’s still a meaningful gift as a 20,000 won ring But he had to I mean, he could’ve just confidently said, “I’m really sorry I can only give you a 20,000 won ring,” “but someday” “I’ll give you a much nicer one” Saying that is more moving than 400,000 won But because of this one lie he threw all of that away Exactly Idiot If this guy’s usual behavior and how he treated her were good enough that even a 20,000 won gift could still really move her heart Right, right Then when he gave it to her he could’ve just said it was 20,000 won like, “This is all I can do” But this guy has some pretentious swagger issues Ah, that leverage 20x was way too much I mean, isn’t this saeggi actually crazy He went bankrupt, he got wiped out in one shot Huh? Ah, some of these stories are seriously making us angry I keep getting frown lines At times like this! (pop) ANUA Anua PDRN Mist This is Ah~ that product all the people with great skin are using these days Anua PDRN Mist You carry that around on there? That’s amazing It’s very portable~ Ah, I’m getting heated, should we cool it down a bit? Ahh~ Hey, the hydration is insane Ah, once you hit your 40s You really have to take care of your skin Did I turn back into my 20s? Spray it one more time and he turned 5 years old? Kyaaa~>< Ah, but this is nice This isn’t the end! There’s one more Anua Anua PDRN Anua PDRN Serum! This is the main one I saw they do it like this Like this, like this Oh, oh wow Oh~ Oh, hey! Hey, there’s zero stickiness, it’s just Chok-(moist) Chok-Chok (moist) I can’t use sticky stuff What’s really good about this is I don’t feel that tightness inside, it’s so nice You gotta pat it like this x2 so it absorbs well, look Tap
Tap tap Tap tap tap
Tap tap tap tap Tap tap tap tap tap
Oop..! (Oh, this is fun) Is it normal for cosmetics to feel tingly like this? And both of these are #1 products at Olive Young And this time there’s a special promotion Buy 1 Get 1 Buy 1 Get 1? Wow, and since we're giving dating advice today for couples you can buy one and share between the two of you As a couple Perfect! Honey! I just turned 20! You know what? The mist that’s on promotion isn’t even the mini version It’s the jumbo-size version! That’s insane! These days the Gen Zs carry stuff like this around Even our cute maknae clipped these on like this (cute) Hey, this is so convenient I should clip it on here too~ I should clip it on here too~ (x2) ...heh The nose is a bit much, right? lol For the detailed promotion info please check the description box Ta-da~ Shall we look at more stories? Yeah, let’s Park Gyu Gang Q8:
(Just like Tata & Justin) I'm usually playful and I often diss them when I like them. It just feels awkward for me to say nice things to them.
So always with guys, nothing develops beyond being friends So always with guys nothing develops beyond being friends I’m 20 right now and I’ve still never dated anyone Could this be a problem with how I show affection? How can I stop being a NBSB (No Boyfriend Since Birth)? Say nice things TN: Problem Solved! I think you understand your problem precisely Among your many guy friends there must have been someone who liked you But if you always treat them like this they’re likely to feel “Oh, she doesn’t really have any romantic interest in me” There’s a high chance of that So, just kind of TN: Real Unc Advice
 
Speak nicely TN: Real Unc Advice
 
Right Ah, but personally I like it when someone jokes with me like this and disses me Get lost~ I love you Like this lol I’m not bothered at all right now (A strong denial is a strong affirmation) I...
Ah, so this is how you must've felt lol I get it now, bro (A memory suddenly comes back) You sulked because of that? This lol This was so funny You sulked because of this? Justin: NOOO!!! Park Gyu Gang Q8:
Hello, I’m a Gyubong of the Baby (20) TN: Justin gets grilled right away
 
Not “Gyubong of the Baby,” / it’s just “Baby Gyubong” They're saying they're a new (baby) Park Gyu Gang member Baby, let’s go! The guy I’m seeing right now likes jokes, but he’s quiet too he’s kind of a weird guy But the problem is, my heart doesn’t flutter Park Gyu Gang Q8:
I have fun around him but
Sometimes I wish I get that Eoheuh flutter from him Eoheuh// Park Gyu Gang Q8:
I have fun around him but
Sometimes I wish I get that Eoheuh flutter from him Ugh bro, just now that was a different kind Like fluttering mixed with fear Something came up your nose? Hey, look at the letters says Eoheuh It’s ‘ㅎ’ then ‘ㅜ’ then ‘ㅎ’ Ah, true x2 Exactly how I read it too Wow, Sejong the Great is indeed great, seriously How can I create that kind of vibe within our everyday life? Please give me some advice Ah~ This one You can’t fix this TN: Another EP with brutally honest dating advice
 
lol He’s just that kind of guy by nature, that oppa You have to accept it like that I saw something somewhere Guys come home and in front of their wife they act really silly do dumb stuff like that, right Yeah We do that too Yeah, sometimes I I do that at home sometimes too I do it in front of Hyejeong all the time The risk is huge (Risk...?) Because every time you do it the risk is huge lol So it’s kind of like gambling(?) Yeah, it’s like gambling Like 70% of the time she laughs, she thinks it’s funny But if that day there’s some bad situation I don’t know about, or or something she’s annoyed at me about Justin: Same!
 
I know what you mean lol And I come in and like usual go “Eheheh~” and do that, then She’s like, “Stop acting like a @#$@...” If that word comes out, it’s game over Backfire Oh, even carrying that huge risk(?) going for it!! is a true... investor lol It’s investing? Ah, I do that sometimes too I put on a really serious voice and go “Honey,” and then I stare like this (❤️) like that Yeah yeah, right Yeah, I do jokes like that Men don’t really do that outside, you know except when meeting friends When working So apparently there’s a reason It’s because it’s you get so comfortable Outside, your defenses kind of kick in but when you come home you enter a world that’s completely on your side and that feels so safe! Right So that’s why we do those things That’s a good thing Yeah So understand it in that kind of way and let it go—you can’t fix it But kind of it might be greed Because there are partners who aren’t fun and aren’t enjoyable at all But you’ve got this one thing going at least And tell your boyfriend I also sometimes Eoheuh// I want there to be moments like that fluttering moments But then the boyfriend goes like this again Aaaangak Ahuh(?) I once asked Hyejeong about this While I was eating I said, “Sorry I’m so weird” I said that, okay? Understandable And then Hyejeong said “I like you because you’re weird” That’s what she said But for me that made my heart flutter ZOLA hard hehehe Eoheuh?! (Crew: what’s with that facial expression) Seeing this story suddenly kind of makes me reflect on myself I should go home today looking really fluttery In that outfit? lol (Crew: She'll definitely see a new side of Justin) Alright~ Park Gyu Gang Q9:
Epik oppas, I’m curious how you overcame each other’s flaws with your wives and how you dealt with them Even if it’s not about dating how you guys dealt with each other’s flaws or things that didn’t click between you Ah well fortunately for me I married someone who has no flaws Oh?! Crew: Ooo... All the flaws are... just mine Sounds like it / That’s right TN: Quickly confirmed by bros
 
Yes, that’s right TN: Quickly confirmed by bros
 
How—wow seriously TN: Quickly confirmed by bros
 
I’ve definitely thought “Hye-jung must be taking in a lot, truly” (??) lol You’re pissed, right? Ah, this... when it’s not just once but keeps happening this is so damn annoying See, you’re pissed right? Hiss But I’m over it already Really? Hey this / me too Hey this clears instantly (hiss) People~ can’t match up perfectly No matter how much you think “those two are a perfect match” “those two fit each other so well” two people who’ve lived around 20 to 25 years in their own styles can’t match up perfectly, honestly Except me and my wife Protective Shield 
Protective Shield 
Protective Shield

(THTH wins) Oh s**t I’m jealous! Alright! Let’s hear the ghost diver’s perspective When we broke up, I ghosted them Not that it happened to me I did the ghosting I want to ask if ghosting is really that bad (Clicks tongue) Earlier we… said “it’s just a jerk move” “it’s trash” but let’s hear them out Let’s look at the details Every time we tried to break up before the final breakup when I tried to end things nicely and said “take care” they would mock me and say nasty things Ah~ there’s a perspective here Breaking up is already hard but hearing insults was really painful and exhausting And I still had lingering feelings so I asked to get back together and it repeated again Then we agreed to take some time apart I felt like otherwise we would never truly break up so I ghosted them at this point After breaking up like that, a month later I sent an email saying we couldn’t go back and blocked everything That’s really how it ended When breaking up people say ghosting isn’t right because you should show respect But for someone who shows no respect I don’t know why I should endure insults Oooo~ I understand the point No That’s not ghosting though So what’s the situation? This person tried to break up but the other person refused to accept it And even insulted them? “You’re really a bad person for doing this” trying to guilt-trip them something like that That could’ve happened But after taking that time apart they reached the conclusion
“I can’t be with you anymore,” and sent an email saying so You did notify them How is that ghosting? Ah, you shouldn’t really call this ghosting It’s more like in war movies like in *Saving Private Ryan* when the bullets are flying there’s a scene where they dive underwater to avoid them It’s kind of like that That kind of diving (jamsoo) So it’s to protect yourself Ah, ducking under If your body is on fire and there’s an ocean in front of you, you dive in At least you have to save yourself So since it’s that kind of situation I don’t think you need to feel that guilty about this When rational people tell each other they’re breaking up some people accept it but there are also people who just can’t accept it There are people who stubbornly try to prevent the breakup When you meet someone like that maybe this is the only way Right On the other hand there are also cases where someone accepts the breakup toooo quickly (Hmm?) …hehehe Please elaborate What are you talking about? You sit down like this “We… you and I…” Ah… Okay! (Breakup in 3 seconds) Kind of like… It goes like that? Yeah, something like that That can also hurt a bit It didn’t happen to me though But I get it now since situations like that exist Right, you don’t necessarily have to show respect to someone who shows no respect The reason we have negative thoughts about ghosting is because between rational people Right But this situation doesn’t even fit the term “jamsoo breakup” Don’t say you ghosted them People will misunderstand you Right / because the word is wrong You’re not that kind of person This is escaping from danger Hello?
